SEARCH
Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class Main

java.lang.Object
com.badlogic.gdx.Game
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.ApplicationListener
public class Main extends com.badlogic.gdx.Game
Main game class that loads shared assets, creates the viewport and stage, starts the background music, and opens the home screen.
